defines: ARDUINO_BOARD="ESP32-S3-N4R8 (4 MB Flash, 8 MB OPI PSRAM)"

targets.name: metrics
targets.title: Firmware Size Metrics
targets.description: Analyze firmware size using esp-idf-size (supports CLI args after --)

targets.name: metrics-only
targets.title: Firmware Size Metrics (No Build)
targets.description: Analyze firmware size without building first

targets.name: coredump
targets.title: Coredump Analysis
targets.description: Analyze coredumps using esp-coredump (supports CLI args after --)
